Authenticates a user using OAuth provider.

## Import

```ts
import { AuthClient } from "@alchemy/signer";
```

## Parameters

### params

`LoginWithOauthParams`

- The OAuth authentication parameters

## Returns

`Promise<Signer>`
A promise that resolves to a Signer instance upon successful authentication
